errorCorrection.title: Sales Data Error Correction
errorCorrection.systemIdNote: TEX is system ID for TE
errorCorrection.searchApiError: Error loading search results. Please try again.
errorCorrection.registerFailed: Failed to register changes. Please try again.
errorCorrection.requiredFieldsEmptySingle: Cannot register. Row {{row}} has empty required field(s): {{fields}}.
errorCorrection.requiredFieldsEmptyMultiple: Cannot register. Please fill in the empty required field(s) in the following rows:
errorCorrection.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete the selected rows with "Item" in Local Item Code? This action cannot be undone.
errorCorrection.deleteDialogMessage: Are you sure you want to delete the following row(s)? This action cannot be undone.
errorCorrection.deleteDialogManyMessage: Are you sure you want to delete all the selected rows? This action cannot be undone.
errorCorrection.deleteFailed: Failed to delete the selected rows. Please try again.
errorCorrection.errorInfo: This means an error that TMAT could not receive as the sales data.
errorCorrection.deleteWarning: The user deletes data which has "Item" in Local Item Code. This operation occurs for data received from TE and TA which System Id is "TEX". Every month there are hundreds of data with Item, so they simply delete those data from this screen.
errorCorrection.systemIdMinChars: System ID must be at least {{count}} characters
errorCorrection.matchTypeRequired: Please select Prefix Match or Partial Match
